storeListing.title: Trivense: Split Trip Expenses
storeListing.shortDescription: Split trip & group bills. Boards, settle-up & analytics. Free to start.
storeListing.fullDescription:
Never wonder who owes what after a trip.

Trivense helps travelers and groups split expenses, track spending, and settle up fast — with expense boards, real-time sync, and smart analytics. Built for India and trusted worldwide.

WHY TRIVENSE
• Clear boards for every trip, group, or household
• See who paid what and who owes whom — instantly
• Budget alerts before you overspend
• Premium analytics when you need deeper insights

PERFECT FOR
• Friends splitting vacation and weekend trip costs
• Roommates tracking rent, utilities, and groceries
• Families planning holidays together
• Groups tired of spreadsheet math

FEATURES
• Expense boards — organize spending by trip, household, or project
• Split & share — invite others with a share code or email
• Settle up — fair balances and one-tap clarity
• Smart analytics — category breakdowns, trends, and comparisons
• Multi-currency — track in ₹ INR, $ USD, and more
• Secure cloud sync — private boards for you and your invitees

FREE & PREMIUM
Free — 1 board, weekly analytics, 3 categories
Premium — unlimited boards, sharing, advanced analytics, export, ad-free

Download Trivense free. Split expenses, made easy.

india.comment: India-first pricing — affordable and competitive locally.

premium.comment: Premium-tier markets — USD anchor converted to local currency via Play.
